string 2: Oh, you! I hear you drove out the Titans.
{next}How did you know that?
{next}That's right!
{next}Uh... I'll just be going now.

Please. You should know how famous you are. You're the talk
of the town!
Ooh! Only someone who's real strong talks like that.

No, wait! I promise this won't be a hassle. Please, hear me
out.

It seems the rumors are true. That means Central Tower's
free of those louts.

And with all the data that goes through that place, there's
loads of useful stuff there.

If it were in my hands, I feel like my creations would get
even better. *wink*
{next}So you want me to get materials for you?
{next}Well, good luck with that!
{end}I'm busy right now. Maybe some other time.
Heh. You're quick on the uptake! I like that.

H-Hold on! Don't be like that! Come on... You know what I'm
asking for.

Oh, I didn't realize you were busy. Come back when you have
time!
So, you'll do the job? Thanks!

I'll send the info on the materials I need to your Digivice,
so check that out later.

They should be right by the Central Tower entrance. I'll be
counting on you!

Oh! You free now? Then I hope you can get those materials
from Central Tower for me.
{next}Sure thing.
{end}Maybe some other time.
Really? That'd be a huge help! Let me give you the details.

Huh... Being so popular must keep you really busy.
Come back when you're free!
Ah, you're back, and I see you got all the materials!
Quick, hand them over! ...Perfect. Thank you.
Now, just wait there a minute.
All right. I'm ready to get to work!

I'll make you something using those materials you got. Just
a minute!

I'd be happy to make you more any time you bring me the
materials.

Now, time to get back to work. My creative drive knows no
end!

I appreciate you helping me out. Here. Take this for your
trouble.
All right. See you later!
